project_scope: lattice-based anonymous authentication backend; not a general-purpose anonymous credential system

paper_safe_claim: v2.1 hardens the route-B SHA-256 authrelation branch with coverage-cost comparison, issue/show tests, combo tamper tests, and SHA-256 constraint-IR export. It remains an engineering fullrelation branch around the LaZer algebraic core, not a production UC-secure anonymous-authentication library.

complete UC theorem with simulator and composition proof
